brand_knowledge_base.message: Brand knowledge base loaded from the standard project location.

brand_context_summary.one_liner: Trip.com helps travelers compare and book flights, hotels, trains, and travel packages in one place.
differentiators: One-stop travel booking across flights, hotels, and transport
brand_context_summary.preferred_cta: Encourage readers to compare their current booking workflow, shortlist the apps that best fit their trip style, and then test the one that saves them the most friction.
